critic.original_hypothesis:
Urban students and working professionals face difficulty in finding quick and hygienic breakfast options in the morning.
Due to busy schedules, many people skip breakfast or depend on unhealthy food choices.
Existing food outlets are often expensive, time-consuming, or lack proper hygiene standards.
There is a high demand for affordable, fast, and clean breakfast services in urban areas.
A tiffin bandi can provide freshly prepared food like idli, dosa, and upma at low cost.
Quick service within 2–5 minutes helps customers save time during rush hours.
Maintaining hygiene and consistent quality builds trust and ensures regular customers.
This startup can generate steady daily income while solving a real-world food accessibility problem.
critic.improvement_suggestions: Define the target niche more specifically

There is a high demand for affordable, fast, and clean breakfast services in urban areas.
A tiffin bandi can provide freshly prepared food like idli, dosa, and upma at low cost.

Maintaining hygiene and consistent quality builds trust and ensures regular customers.
This startup can generate steady daily income while solving a real-world food accessibility problem.
